title: Osmania University Time Table 2026 for BHMCT & BCTCA (CBCS) Main & Backlog Examinations

detail.title: Osmania University Time Table 2026 for BHMCT & BCTCA (CBCS) Main & Backlog Examinations
detail.short_info: Osmania University Time Table 2026 released for BHMCT & BCTCA (CBCS) Main and Backlog Examinations June/July 2026. Download OU exam timetable PDF at ouexams.in.

sections.heading: Osmania University Time Table 2026 for BHMCT & BCTCA (CBCS) Main & Backlog Examinations

content.text: Osmania University (OU), Hyderabad has officially released the Osmania University Time Table 2026 for BHMCT and BCTCA (CBCS) Main & Backlog Examinations scheduled for June/July 2026. Students pursuing these undergraduate hotel management and catering technology courses can now check the detailed exam schedule on the official website – www.ouexams.in.

This Osmania University Time Table 2026 notification is important for all regular and backlog candidates. Students are advised to download the official timetable and prepare according to the revised schedule.
Download Osmania University Time Table 2026 PDF

Osmania University has published the Osmania University Time Table 2026 for BHMCT & BCTCA CBCS programmes. The examinations will be conducted in June/July 2026 for both Main and Backlog students. The complete schedule is now available on the university examination portal.

sections.heading: Osmania University Time Table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: The Osmania University Time Table 2026 contains the complete subject-wise schedule for BHMCT and BCTCA (CBCS) Main and Backlog examinations. Students can check their respective papers and important dates from the official notification. The timetable covers theory examinations for all semesters.
Candidates are requested to note the exact dates, timings, and instructions mentioned in the official Osmania University Time Table 2026 PDF.

sections.heading: How to Download Osmania University Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the Osmania University Time Table 2026 from the official examination portal. Follow these simple steps to get your copy.

items: Go to the official Osmania University exams website at www.ouexams.in.
Click on the "Exam Notifications" section available on the homepage.
Search for the latest notification titled "BHMCT & BCTCA (CBCS) Main & Backlog Examinations, June/July-2026".
Click on the timetable link to open the PDF file.
Download and save the Osmania University Time Table 2026 PDF on your device.
Print a copy and keep it handy for your exam preparation.

content.text: Regularly visit the official website for any updates or changes in the Osmania University Time Table 2026.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Osmania University Time Table 2026

content.text: The official Osmania University Time Table 2026 notification includes all essential information for the upcoming BHMCT and BCTCA examinations. Below are the key details mentioned in the document:

items: Course name: BHMCT & BCTCA under CBCS scheme
Type of examination: Main and Backlog
Examination month: June/July 2026
Official notification link and download instructions
Important guidelines for candidates
Examination centre and timing details
Applicable semesters and year of admission.
